contract_summary: This is a module-level get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the async DMA engine subsystem by incrementing the global dmaengine_ref_count. Called at module initialization to guarantee the async DMA subsystem remains available. The caller (module init) must pair this with a corresponding put at module cleanup (likely via async_dmaengine_put). No error handling is needed as the operation always succeeds. The reference is not returned to the caller; it is held globally until explicitly released.
